_ Copy to ~/.config/local-dictation/dictionary.json and edit. A flat list of
_ names / products / domain terms that are ALREADY spelled how you want — the
_ cleanup model is told to preserve them instead of substituting a similar
_ common word. This is a soft hint only (no text is rewritten). For hard
_ from→to fixes (e.g. lings → Lingzi), use corrections.json instead.
_ Strings starting with _ are comments and ignored.
